user.title: Add a vehicle
user.description: Name the vehicle and choose the mileage sensor that Home Assistant should trust.

services.title: Choose maintenance to track
services.description: All services are selected for {vehicle}. Check or uncheck as many items as you want, then select Submit once.

intervals.title: Review service intervals
intervals.description: Review the recurring interval for every selected item on {vehicle}. Coolant uses a 137,500-mile first service and the repeat interval shown here.

data.interval_timing_inspection: Timing Belt or Chain Inspection interval (miles)

notifications.title: Maintenance notifications
notifications.description: Optionally send one weekly summary for maintenance approaching on {vehicle}.

error.odometer_already_configured: This odometer source is already assigned to another vehicle.
error.odometer_not_miles: The odometer must report miles. Create a miles conversion sensor first.
error.odometer_not_numeric: The selected odometer does not currently have a numeric state.
error.invalid_notify_action: Enter an available notification action such as notify.notify.
error.select_at_least_one_service: Select at least one maintenance item to track.

init.title: Vehicle maintenance options
init.description: Update the vehicle name or authoritative odometer source.
